ll be taken offline at about 10am Friday, October 10, 2025, so that we may perform an in-place upgrade to a newer version of Windows Server. This upgrade may take a few hours; we expect that winterm.eecs will be usable again by mid-afternoon. UPDATE

ecs will be usable again by mid-afternoon. UPDATE [2025-10-10 | larsrohr ] Unfortunately, the in-place upgrade was ultimately unsuccessful. We may schedule another upgrade attempt, but in any case will begin preparing an alternate host with a newer O

l begin preparing an alternate host with a newer OS version. Resolved as of 2025-10-10 4:45pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed
